label: Generic — high engagement, no CTA click

output.inferred_need: A clear, low-friction next step without feeling pushed
output.message_angle: Reward the attention — offer something useful before a hard ask
output.offer_type: Guide, checklist, coupon, short consult, or soft popup matched to the page context
output.surface: Inline module or soft popup after meaningful scroll
output.timing: After sustained scroll or a second page in the session
output.recommended_activation_summary: Visitor is engaged but has not clicked a CTA — surface a low-friction offer (guide, coupon, consult, or contextual soft popup) aligned to what they have been reading.
